description: Beta patch: fix published trellis-hgl CLI metadata so the shipped core dependency pins to an exact trellis-hgl-core version instead of `workspace:*`.
changelog:
**Bug Fixes:**
- fix(release): published `trellis-hgl` CLI metadata now pins `trellis-hgl-core` to the matching exact beta version instead of shipping `workspace:*` in the released package manifest.
notes: Run `npm install -g trellis-hgl@beta` to refresh the published CLI package metadata. No file migration is required.
